title: Insel der Dämonen
writer: Friedrich Dalsheim, Walter Spies, Baron Victor von Plessen
plot: Wajan, the son of Nudonk,a witch, is beset with difficulties. His mother is in ill favor with the Balinese natives who want to get rid of her, and the hand of Sari, a native chieftain's daughter, will not be his until this is accompl
